key.name: position-offset
key.summary: Horizontal offset from screen center in pixels
key.description: Shift the island left (negative) or right (positive) from center.

key.name: show-album-art
key.summary: Show album art in expanded view
key.description: Display album artwork when the island is expanded on hover.

key.name: show-seek-bar
key.summary: Show seek bar in expanded view
key.description: Display playback progress bar in the expanded view.

key.name: auto-hide
key.summary: Auto-hide when no media is active
key.description: Fully hide the island pill when no MPRIS player is running.

key.name: intercept-osd
key.description: Show volume and brightness changes inside the island instead of the default GNOME OSD popup.

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration for island expand and collapse animations.

key.name: notch-scale
key.description: Overall scale multiplier for the island (0.8 to 1.5 recommended).
